title: EMI Trades
body:
# EMI Trades

An addon for EMI adding Villager Trade support.

### Features

* Showing the costs and payments
* Showing the level required for a trade
* Wandering trader trade support

### Config

This mod adds a very simple config in 1.0.2 (`config/emitrades.toml` or `config/emitrades.json5` in 1.2.0+), only to toggle the old and new display of recipes. No GUI yet, so you need to manually edit it.
